title: Word Count Calculator
scenario: Write a short Python function that takes a string input and outputs the word count. The function should handle inputs with varying numbers of words.
constraints: Must use Python's built-in split() method

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically valid Python code
The generated code should adhere to the given constraints (lines of code, split() method)
The generated code should correctly process the input and output the word count
